content.text: Best practiceUse local variables instead of global variables whenever possible.
Use local variables instead of global variables whenever possible.

list: Global variables with constexpr initializers (including literals) are initialized to those values. This is calledconstant initialization.Global variables without initializers are zero-initialized. Zero-initialization is considered to be a form of static-initialization since0is a constexpr value.
Global variables without initializers are zero-initialized. Zero-initialization is considered to be a form of static-initialization since0is a constexpr value.

content.text: NomenclatureThe ambiguity in the order that objects with static storage duration in different translation units are initialized is often called thestatic initialization order fiasco.
The ambiguity in the order that objects with static storage duration in different translation units are initialized is often called thestatic initialization order fiasco.

WarningAvoid initializing objects with static duration using other objects with static duration from a different translation unit.Dynamic initialization of global variables is also susceptible to initialization order issues and should be avoided whenever possible.

Avoid initializing objects with static duration using other objects with static duration from a different translation unit.Dynamic initialization of global variables is also susceptible to initialization order issues and should be avoided whenever possible.
Dynamic initialization of global variables is also susceptible to initialization order issues and should be avoided whenever possible.
A reminderGlobalconstvariables have internal linkage by default,gravitydoesn’t need to bestatic.
Globalconstvariables have internal linkage by default,gravitydoesn’t need to bestatic.
